overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence depicting a spacecraft in planetary orbit. The clip begins with a slow exterior pull-back shot revealing the vessel's engine cluster and hull against the backdrop of space and a nearby celestial body, then cuts to the interior cockpit where a pilot character moves through the command deck.

scene_state.functional_zone: planetary orbit with spacecraft and surface vehicle

events.description: camera pull-back reveals large planet or moon in the background
camera completes pull-back revealing full spacecraft hull and nearby surface rover

agents.ego_description: camera drifts backward revealing the scale and mechanical details of the spacecraft

entered.detail: array of multiple circular rocket nozzles arranged in a grid pattern
cylindrical spacecraft body with metallic gray surface and panel lines
large planet or moon partially visible in the background with atmospheric haze
small six-wheeled vehicle positioned on the surface below the spacecraft

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a tight shot of a spacecraft's engine nozzle cluster against the darkness of space. As the camera slowly pulls back, the full cylindrical hull of the vessel comes into view, along with a small surface rover parked on the terrain below. A massive celestial body looms in the upper left background, establishing the orbital setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: spacecraft cockpit with pilot command station

events.description: hard cut from exterior space view to interior cockpit
pilot character stands up from the command chair

agents.ego_description: pilot character rises from the command chair and moves toward the side control panels

notable_agents.action: standing up from pilot chair and walking toward the instrument panels

entered.detail: ergonomic command chair with high backrest and integrated arm controls
array of illuminated screens and holographic control interfaces
wall-mounted control arrays with glowing buttons and displays
ceiling-mounted rectangular light fixtures providing ambient illumination

segments.scene_description: The scene cuts to the spacecraft's interior cockpit, where a pilot in a white uniform is seated at the command station. The character stands up and moves through the cabin, passing by illuminated control panels and instrument displays. The environment features a high-tech, industrial design with muted lighting and multiple screen interfaces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot transitions from a vast orbital perspective of a spacecraft's exterior to an intimate view of its high-tech interior command deck. It begins with a tight focus on the engine nozzle cluster against the void of space, slowly pulling back to reveal the vessel's cylindrical hull and a small surface rover on the terrain below. As the camera retreats, a massive celestial body looms in the background to establish the orbital setting before the perspective shifts abruptly inside the spacecraft's cockpit. The scene then opens onto the interior cabin, where a pilot in a white uniform stands from the command station and moves through the space. This movement carries the viewer past illuminated control panels and instrument displays within an industrial environment defined by muted lighting and multiple screen interfaces.
